creator: ncrogers@gmail.com
text:
Squid 3.5.21 was released about 10 days ago.

http://squid-web-proxy-cache.1019090.n4.nabble.com/squid-announce-Squid-3-5-21-is-available-td4679447.html

I see the 4.x devel port has been updated. I am wondering if the maintainer plans on continuing to support 3.x or not?
